files.patch:
@@ -51,1 +51,1 @@
-# Compile @ValueClass annotation WITHOUT --enable-preview.
+# Compile @AsValueClass annotation WITHOUT --enable-preview.
@@ -55,1 +55,1 @@
-    INCLUDE_FILES := jdk/test/lib/valueclass/ValueClass.java, \
+    INCLUDE_FILES := jdk/test/lib/valueclass/AsValueClass.java, \

@@ -40,4 +40,0 @@ - * To enable value class mode, build the test image and run tests with: - * 
- *   make test TEST=... JTREG=VALUE_CLASS_PLUGIN=true
- *
@@ -47,1 +43,1 @@ -public @interface ValueClass {} +public @interface AsValueClass {}
